description: Reference environment — Python API + Angular front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the python-angular app.

repos.name: coderflow-reference-apps
repos.post_clone_action:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-angular/api && pip install -r requirements.txt
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-angular/web && npm install

application_server.name: Python + Angular
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-angular/api && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001 &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-angular/web && npm start
